problem id: 94c25c56
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR NOT SHR(7)

examples:
  01001000 -> 11111111
  01010010 -> 11111111
  10101110 -> 11111110
  11100101 -> 11111111
  01000011 -> 11111111
  10101101 -> 11111110
  10010100 -> 11111110
  10111000 -> 11111110

query: 11011100
predicted answer: 11111111
